description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a light-colored exterior and a red-tiled hip roof. The structure features a mix of rectangular and square windows, some of which are narrow and vertically oriented, while others are larger and more standard in shape. The house includes a prominent front entryway with a small set of steps, a covered porch, and a decorative overhang. Balconies with black railings are visible on the upper floor, adding to the architectural interest. The property is surrounded by a low white fence, and the overall design is clean and modern with Mediterranean influences. The roof has a gentle slope, and the facade is punctuated by a combination of window sizes and placements.
description: A modern two-story house with a red-tiled hip roof, light exterior walls, balconies, and a decorative front entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing a long facade with several narrow vertical windows and a low white fence.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the hip roof, upper and lower balconies with black railings, and large windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a mix of narrow and standard windows, a visible entryway, and a small porch area.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, decorative overhang, and a prominent window above the door.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of narrow vertical and standard windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small set of steps, covered porch, decorative overhang, and a large window above the door
